name: 角的认识
subject: math
domain_name: 几何与测量 / Geometry & Measure / Geometry & Measure
curriculum_points: • 5Gg.07 Estimate, compare and classify angles, using geometric vocabulary including acute, right, obtuse and reflex.
• 5Gg.08 Know that the sum of the angles on a straight line is 180°, and use this to calculate missing angles on a straight line.
• 6Gg.09 Classify, estimate, measure and draw angles.
• 6Gg.10 Know that the sum of the angles in a triangle is 180°, and use this to calculate missing angles in a triangle.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 角的概念：拖动点观察角度变化
GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「角的认识」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：• 5Gg.07 Estimate, compare and classify angles, using geometric vocabulary including acute, right, obtuse and reflex.…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：• 5Gg.08 Know that the sum of the angles on a straight line is 180°, and use thi… 对理解「角的认识」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
